name: @yesid/motion
description: Pure brand motion actions extracted byte-faithful from yesid.dev @ 2bdb611d. Snappy Doctrine vocabulary (Tier 1): boop, magnetic, cursorGlow, sectionGlow, cardParallax, pressBounce, wordmarkHover + sectionMagnet. morphHover/scrollChain stay app-side (Tier 2).
//: Runtime contract: the consuming page must load @yesid/tokens' generated tokens.css — magnetic/boop/cursorGlow reference --duration-*/--ease-bounce/--primary-rgb CSS custom properties at runtime. src/tokens.ts is GENERATED by packages/tokens' build (do not hand-edit). The two-tier tap-press system's Layer 1 CSS baseline (pairs with the pressBounce action) is a COPY-PASTE consumer snippet — tap-feedback.css — not an import; the package ships zero app-conditional CSS.
